locations.name: 残阳坳黄昏总场景
locations.set_rules: Use 残阳坳黄昏总场景 as episode 01 art reference. 总空间和区域色参考。 Preserve LOC_CANYANG_GATE;LOC_MEDICINE_HOUSE;LOC_OLD_WELL. No readable generated text, UI, watermark, high-magic spectacle, or unapproved reveal.

locations.name: 残阳坳村口验血席
locations.set_rules: Use 残阳坳村口验血席 as episode 01 art reference. 村口验血、白布、短矛封锁和清明香参考。 Preserve LOC_CANYANG_GATE;PROP_QINGMING_REGISTER. No readable generated text, UI, watermark, high-magic spectacle, or unapproved reveal.
usage: 村口验血、白布、短矛封锁和清明香参考。

locations.name: 罗家药屋外景/门槛
locations.set_rules: Use 罗家药屋外景/门槛 as episode 01 art reference. 门槛失言、药屋门口和后院方向参考。 Preserve LOC_MEDICINE_HOUSE;RULE_SPATIAL_GEOGRAPHY. No readable generated text, UI, watermark, high-magic spectacle, or unapproved reveal.
usage: 门槛失言、药屋门口和后院方向参考。

locations.name: 罗家药屋内景/药柜
locations.set_rules: Use 罗家药屋内景/药柜 as episode 01 art reference. 药柜压迫构图、罗青禾手势、白翳入内参考。 Preserve LOC_MEDICINE_HOUSE;RULE_HIDE_RELAY_MARKS. No readable generated text, UI, watermark, high-magic spectacle, or unapproved reveal.
usage: 药柜压迫构图、罗青禾手势、白翳入内参考。

locations.name: 罗家后院旧井
locations.set_rules: Use 罗家后院旧井 as episode 01 art reference. 水缸、旧井、墙根清明香和井沿擦痕参考。 Preserve LOC_OLD_WELL;RULE_MOON_WHITE_GLINT_ONLY. No readable generated text, UI, watermark, high-magic spectacle, or unapproved reveal.
usage: 水缸、旧井、墙根清明香和井沿擦痕参考。

locations.name: 药屋暗格与旧驿刻痕
locations.set_rules: Use 药屋暗格与旧驿刻痕 as episode 01 art reference. 暗格暴露、残缺日月纹、虫蜡封条参考。 Preserve PROP_HIDDEN_RELAY_COMPARTMENT;FACTION_ZHAOMING_RELIC. No readable generated text, UI, watermark, high-magic spectacle, or unapproved reveal.
usage: 暗格暴露、残缺日月纹、虫蜡封条参考。
